name: AirPods Pro 2

protocol._doc: Apple Accessory Protocol over L2CAP PSM 0x1001. Noise control = 11-byte frame 04 00 04 00 09 00 0D <mode> 00 00 00 (mode 01=Off 02=ANC 03=Transparency 04=Adaptive). PSM/UUID/framing are protocol constants in AacpEngine; this block is declarative.

_capabilities_source: LibrePods (kavishdevar/librepods) docs/AAP Definitions.md + firmware 7A305. sound_mode (0900 0D) VERIFIED live on AirPods Pro 2 (USB-C) 2026-06-30 via Orchestra AacpEngine: all 4 modes set + device-confirmed + audibly verified.

functions.title: Noise control

set._doc: AacpEngine ignores command/payload_template for aacp and builds the 11-byte AAP frame from the mode byte; option_values map optId → the AAP mode byte (hex).

read._doc: AAP is push: the engine caches the mode from inbound 04 00 04 00 09 00 0D <mode> notifications; value_map maps the mode byte → optId. notify_opcode/state_byte_index are declarative until Phase 3's generic notification parser.

functions._verified_note: All 4 modes set + read live on AirPods Pro 2 (USB-C), Pixel 8 / Android 16, 2026-06-30 (Orchestra Plan 1). Device echoes 0900 0D <mode> after each set; audibly confirmed.

functions.title: Battery

read._doc: AacpEngine parses 04 00 04 00 04 00 <count> (<comp> 01 <level> <status> 01)* into per-bud battery. NOT a native device-settings row (settingslib won't render a switch-less, action-less row); surfaced via the native Fast-Pair battery header (untethered-battery metadata keys) + Orchestra's app. inject:false keeps it off the device-settings page while the engine still parses it.

functions._verified_note: Battery notifications observed live on AirPods Pro 2 (USB-C), Pixel 8 / Android 16, 2026-06-30.

functions.title: Ear detection

read._doc: AacpEngine parses 04 00 04 00 06 00 <primary> <secondary> (0=in-ear 1=out 2=case); readInfo('ear_detection') returns the live summary. NOT a native device-settings row (settingslib won't render a switch-less, action-less row); surfaced in Orchestra's own app. inject:false keeps it off the device-settings page while the engine still parses it.

functions._verified_note: Ear-detection notifications observed live on AirPods Pro 2 (USB-C), 2026-06-30.

functions.title: Conversational Awareness
functions.summary: Lowers volume when you start speaking

set._doc: AacpEngine.applyToggle builds 04 00 04 00 09 00 28 <01 on / 02 off> 00 00 00 (feature 0x28). command/option_values declarative; the engine keys on the function id.

read._doc: AAP sends 04 00 04 00 09 00 28 <status> once after notification-request; the engine caches it (readToggle).

functions._verified_note: CA toggle set/state verified live on AirPods Pro 2 (USB-C), 2026-06-30.

functions.title: Automatic ear detection
functions.summary: Pause when a pod is removed, resume when re-worn
functions._doc: LOCAL behavior toggle: not an AAP command. The provider persists the per-device enable (DeviceStore) and the SystemUI broker gates auto-pause/resume on it. No set/read frames.
functions._verified_note: Auto-pause/resume verified live on AirPods Pro 2 (USB-C), Pixel 8, 2026-07-01 (Plan 6 Task 2): removing any pod pauses, reinserting resumes, background, no notification.

functions.title: Lower volume when speaking
functions.summary: Duck media volume while you speak (needs Conversational Awareness on)
functions._doc: LOCAL behavior toggle: not an AAP command. The SystemUI broker ducks/restores STREAM_MUSIC on the buds' CA speech notifications (opcode 0x4B, levels 01/02=speaking, 08/09=ended). Only fires while conversational_awareness (0x28) is enabled on the buds.
